description.s: Structural editor for Hob JSON AST. Renders compact JSON AST as syntax-colored s-expressions with full keyboard-driven editing. Press Ctrl+/ to see all keyboard shortcuts.
Selecting a hole or pressing r on a node enters input mode. Typing fills the hole with symbol/keyword/number values. Additional modes:
: String mode (multi-character input with Enter to commit)
: Commit current value and create new sibling hole

renderCollection.name: renderCollection
renderCollection.signature: (node, open, close, className, state, itemNames, api, indent)
